claim: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) Abolition overrides parental choice, maintainer autonomy (including church/foundation institutions' 6/8-year formational mission), and an established talent-development pathway, and risks disrupting currently young children's school community and commute unless catchment rules and continuity safeguards are locked in before implementation.
interest: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the concern(s) raised by konzervativ_ertekvedo, egyhazi_fenntartoi, kisgyerekes_szuloi
value: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) a trade-off between the scenario's stated goal and the concern raised
fear: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the benefit claimed will not materialise as described
assumption: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the claim's premise holds under implementation as designed
empirical_uncertainty: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) not independently graded here — see the evidence layer
